name: The White House
subject: Another win on trade
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043f6ed3d0318dbc390bbe96f3c3416a2cdff1aafa8cd5a4b8ae28e4f32349747feabcce6bb3286076c805cd4b332ba87007

Another win on trade

In the past few weeks, President Donald J. Trump has fought to secure one of his key promises to the American people: negotiating free, fair, and reciprocal trade deals for the American worker.

Yesterday, U.S. Trade Representative Robert Lighthizer announced a new agreement with South Korea that accomplishes exactly that:

“The improved KORUS agreement reflects the President’s leadership in delivering more reciprocal trade outcomes benefiting U.S. workers, exporters, and businesses. The United States and Korea have strengthened an important economic relationship by agreeing to substantial improvements to KORUS that will help rebalance our trade, reduce our trade deficit, and expand U.S. export opportunities.”

News of the deal is earning the Administration widespread recognition. “The finalization of a trade agreement with South Korea would hand Mr. Trump a victory in his ‘America First’ approach to trade,” The New York Times reported.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043fda4c88041290e35fe100c11741838576b2226dd02cf135c6b41e0dbd6cbd23633f35466b216da292a0938ee4f2519fc6
Learn more about this important win for American workers and businesses.

Optimism abounds

Each week, the Administration is seeing more and more news that consumer and business confidence continue to soar, particularly now that President Trump’s tax cuts are helping the U.S. economy take off after eight years of stagnation.

The latest headlines show the good news keeps coming:

- Pew: Economy ‘Good-Excellent’ Rating Highest in 18 Years (Washington Examiner)
- Business Economists Optimistic About Growth: Survey (The Hill)
- U.S. Consumer Confidence Hits 14-Year High (The Wall Street Journal)
- U.S. Job Openings Surge to Record High in January (Reuters)

President Trump’s work is only just beginning, but the early signs all show that smart policy is all it took to unleash America’s economic power.

Read more:
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043f125cba414841edcfa54e3e80582e7e65dfeb3aa0f5fad5c544ca3f33ee7d114b6dffec162ac4058bb9603e663c6ac765
The American economy is coming back strong

Secretary DeVos: How omnibus makes schools safer

The bipartisan omnibus deal that President Trump signed into law last week delivers desperately needed resources for our Nation’s troops. Another important goal it accomplishes is helping to make American schools safer.

“The president has called on Congress to expand mental health programs, including those that help identify and treat individuals who may be a threat to themselves or others,” Education Secretary Betsy DeVos wrote in the Washington Examiner this week. “Congress heard and acted on this request in its omnibus spending bill, giving $700 million to the Department of Education for Student Support and Academic Enrichment grants.”

As part of the omnibus, Congress also passed the STOP School Violence Act and the Fix NICS Act, the latter of which strengthens America’s criminal background check system.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043f463c7e45d7933fbbd283ca7775b0fda6d27933d59584d5b069fc93626f4726f0da8eaa1c1ca872258927d7f9c72bfdf2
Learn more about how this law will help make American schoolchildren safer.

Photo of the Day

The Jacqueline Kennedy Garden | March 26, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

This morning, President Trump will host a credentialing ceremony for newly appointed ambassadors to Washington, D.C. The President will then have lunch with the Secretary of Defense.

Vice President Mike Pence will deliver keynote remarks at an America First Policies “Tax Cuts to Put America First” event at the Minneapolis Convention Center.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043f28622d639c0ff56d9b4a339549132879909169166c20c051cb4f079255b8bdeec8d141b44eba3cd43731be6645713b48
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=addfc0040e27043f3720de1f39b7b523a24fd5cd6108558e2cb5a525eb04acef34f1148fa75905bb996a84e67f3a7d6a8ad748d412f5e9c2
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a833177e6475369557cf1925f11ad58845baa1360d53e853852478c93bed8bc082af10662b3ccac3d5e6c04ea98725614802defeaa02c4b4

We hope you will take them up on this challenge with our **end-of-quarter deadline only 4 days away.** [](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-odiquy-ydllhlurty-y/) **\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------** **Mississippi Tea Party Issues Fundraising Challenge on Behalf of Chris McDaniel** Tuesday, March 27, 2018 - Yesterday, the Mississippi Tea Party made a contribution of $500 dollars to Friends of Chris McDaniel in support of Sen. McDaniel's campaign for U.S. Senate. At this time, we are challenging other conservative individuals and conservative organizations to match our contribution. "We know there is an end-of-the-month campaign finance reporting deadline with the FEC and it is our hope that our challenge will help Sen. McDaniel close out the month with a strong fundraising report. " said Laura VanOverschelde, Chairman of the Mississippi Tea Party. "We are calling on conservative individuals and groups to match our contribution of $500. It's important now to rally around Sen. McDaniel to make sure he has the resources needed to effectively communicate his message to Mississippians to guarantee that we send a true conservative to Washington to fight on our behalf." ### [Join with the Mississippi Tea Party become a founding donor and chip in to support a true conservative for United State Senate.](http://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-l-odiquy-ydllhlurty-j/) With only **4 days** left in our FEC end-of-quarter deadline, we need your support now more than ever. \- Team McDaniel

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Last night, I had a big nightmare. In the dream, it's the night of November 6th, polls are closed, and I turn on the news and see this: | [](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/20005548/4211911017/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?refcode=sbe180327pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
---
I have chills thinking about this becoming a reality. And whether or not that happens depends on if we have resources. **Peter, that means money.**
[__**Can you rush in a contribution to make sure we reach our $320,000 FEC goal?**__](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/20005548/4211911017/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?refcode=sbe180327pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Express Donate: $5](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/2000554f/4211911017/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180327pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $10](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/2000554f/4211911017/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180327pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Express Donate: $26](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/2000554f/4211911017/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180327pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")**
**[Or donate another amount.](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/20005548/4211911017/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?refcode=sbe180327pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")**
It's no secret why I'm having nightmares about the race: The NRSC just launched attack ads against Sherrod. A recent poll shows Trump's standing on the rise in our state -- and us losing ground. He'll even be here in Ohio on Thursday. All this adds up to some concerning momentum for the GOP, who are working around the clock to defeat Sherrod.
Bottom line -- we can't afford to miss our FEC goal. If we raise another $20,994 before the FEC deadline Saturday, we will hit our $320,000 and have the resources to keep fighting. If not... well, the nightmare might just come true.
[_**Rush in your contribution before the Saturday deadline.**_](http://oh.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffb7c/4462dc26/437c3824/20005548/4211911017/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwMzI3cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180327pm?refcode=sbe180327pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")
Hopefully I can get some sleep tonight,
Justin

Last month there were more jobs in Rhode Island than at any other time in history. Our state has the third highest rate of wage growth in the nation, and we've shot up to No. 9 on Business Insider's list of America's strongest economies.
That's economic progress -- and that's exactly the kind of progress we can expect over the next four years if Gina is re-elected.
The first quarter of 2018 ends Saturday night, and with it comes one of our most important fundraising deadlines of the year. **We're $17,443 away from reaching our quarterly goal. Will you help us get closer? Every dollar makes a difference.**
**[Click here to rush $11 or as much as you can to the campaign before our SATURDAY NIGHT deadline!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a08b/5e076a9e/546a3c02/14427f67/2787775322/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raimondo?refcode=180327")**
This year's election is a critical one for our state. It's not just the economy -- Gina will remain a champion for the environment, banning assault weapons, and protecting Rhode Island's most vulnerable. We need your support to protect our progress in this year's crucial election.
Thank you!
Kate Ramstad
Finance Director

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: I don't like the word "can't"
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I've never liked the word "can't" much. When I first considered running for office, people said "you can't win." I was up against six opponents. Almost all of the Florida "good 'ol boys" club told me they were supporting one of their own. They said "you can't...wait for your turn." They told me "you can't." But I didn't let them discourage me. I knocked on every door I could. I met people face-to-face, told them my ideas, and then I listened...understood their concerns. By the end, I knocked on 25,000 doors in the district. And I won! We've heard that word over and over in the years since. You can't pass health care reform. You can't stop the destructive trajectory of the Trump administration. _You can't, you can't, you can't._ I say we can. When we get out there and do our part, we can accomplish anything. [_**This month is no exception. We need to grow our grassroots organization so we can turnout voters. We must reach our $30,000 FEC goal by March 31st. That gives us another 3 days to get this done. I know we can do it. Will you rush in $5 or more to help?**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113feb/622b7b5b/1a1c1cd4/307b8b5c/527289357/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180326?refcode=dwse180326_m&recurring=true&amount=5") [_**Don 't say you can't...act now and let me know you can!**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113feb/622b7b5b/1a1c1cd4/307b8b5c/527289357/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180326?refcode=dwse180326_m&recurring=true&amount=5") This reelection campaign is serious. I have five opponents this year. I'm up against "substantial GOP money." None of that will stop me from doing my job. I will stand up to the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress. I will continue to fight for Florida families, come what may. But I need your help. We cannot miss our very first FEC goal of the year. [_**If you can, please give now.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113feb/622b7b5b/1a1c1cd4/307b8b5c/527289357/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse180326?refcode=dwse180326_m&recurring=true&amount=5") Thank you, Debbie
---

subject: Join our team

body:
Friend,

This is something I've been looking forward to saying for a long time: I'm running to represent the 1st district of Pennsylvania in Congress, and I hope I can count on your support.

I grew up on progressive values. My father ran a chicken hatchery on Swamp Road in Doylestown, and my mother worked her heart out as the president of Planned Parenthood of Bucks County. As a young man, I did everything from working as a carpenter's assistant to pumping gas, flipping burgers and waiting tables before graduating from Haverford College and eventually Villanova Law.

Since then, I've been honored to serve as a general counsel for the U.S. Senate Committee on Veterans Affairs and for the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee, where I helped write the Missing Children's Assistance Act of 1984 and legislation helping runaway and homeless youth. I worked for nonprofit legal organizations, pushing Congress to enact laws like the Innocence Protection Act and college debt relief for students who agree to serve as a prosecutor or public defender.

**[Watch my official announcement and commit to joining Team Wallace today! We need to come together to take back the House!](https://act.myngp.com/el/4kMSspRDIqCwEOfU1EVq9g==/3kCIMA9wuYD6FJQl14YHdA==)**

I would really appreciate your support in this fight, friend. Everything we do in the next few months is about being a part of a grassroots movement, to take back America from the unapologetic billionaire class that is now calling the shots in Washington. I believe we play a crucial role in recapturing the House of Representatives from Paul Ryan and his yes-men like Brian Fitzpatrick.

This campaign will need all of our energy and support. I am all-in, and I hope you will join me. United, we can accomplish something great. **[Please watch our launch video today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4kMSspRDIqCwEOfU1EVq9g==/3kCIMA9wuYD6FJQl14YHdA==)**

Enough is enough! C'mon, let's fight back!!

Thanks,

Scott Wallace ** **
** **

name: Tom Perez
subject: Say NO to 2020 census citizenship question, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
This week, the Trump administration announced that they intend to include a citizenship question on the 2020 census.
---
Derek --

This week, the Trump administration announced that they intend to include a citizenship question on the 2020 census -- and now it's up to us to stop them.

Adding this question to the census, especially at this point in the process and without any testing, is extremely reckless. It could decrease response rates in communities with large immigrant populations and produce inaccurate results due to incomplete counts. Congress depends on those results not only to decide how to distribute federal resources -- but also to determine the number of congressional districts in each state.

This calculated move is a clear attempt by Republicans to maximize their political power and undermine fair representation in government. We must do everything we can to stop it.

**Add your name to oppose the Trump administration's decision to include a citizenship question on the 2020 census.**

**[SIGN THE PLEDGE](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/citizenship-question?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+THE+PLEDGE&utm_campaign=em_20180328_tp_nd&source=em_20180328_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180328_tp_nd")**
Many immigrants are already fearful of deportation under the Trump administration. Including a citizenship question on the census will spread more fear among immigrants who are worried the information will be used against them.

But this move is not only another attempt to intimidate immigrants -- it is an attempt by Republicans to sabotage important census data to rig our political system in their favor. It is critical that we speak out against it.

**[Stand up against the Trump administration's decision to include a citizenship question on the 2020 census. Add your name today.](https://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/citizenship-question?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Stand+up+against+the+Trump+administratio&utm_campaign=em_20180328_tp_nd&source=em_20180328_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180328_tp_nd")**

Thanks for taking a stand against this reckless decision.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

body:
In 2012, special interest groups spent more than $40 million against us. They called me the "Hunted Democrat." Now, they're coming after me again.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180328-Brown-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Tough re-elections are nothing new.

In 2012, special interest groups spent more than $40 million against us. They wanted me gone, and they weren't shy about spending money to make that happen. They called me the "Hunted Democrat."

But grassroots supporters like you stepped up. We organized. We mobilized. And when the polls closed and all the votes were counted, we came out ahead.

We're up against some tough challenges in this campaign, too. Trump's hand-picked candidate, Congressman Jim Renacci, is winning in his primary. There are new attack ads out against us. Trump's standing is on the rise in Ohio. He has visited the Buckeye state three times since Inauguration Day and is coming back _this Thursday_.

[**Just like in 2012, my fellow Senate Democrats and I need your help to come out ahead. The DSCC 's next big FEC deadline is coming up this Saturday. Can you pitch in $1 right now to re-elect me and other Senate Democrats?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20180328-Brown-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

But some things don't change: I'm still fighting like hell for Ohio families. I'm still working to level the playing field for Ohio businesses and workers. I'm still dedicated to protecting access to quality, affordable health care.

And I'm still counting on you to help us beat back the special interest cash and win in November.

name: Mark Warner
subject: Asking for a friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,

Can I ask a favor? We're just days away from the first FEC fundraising deadline of 2018, and I want to make sure that my friend Tim Kaine can post the fundraising numbers he needs to win in November and keep up the great work he is doing for Virginia in the Senate. [Will you join me in supporting Tim by making a donation of any amount today? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=2SULXUe2yhrSB7jDsMau32IUwqBFYcFI)

Tim has set a goal of 10,000 individual small-dollar donations to make sure his campaign is powered by people, not the special interests. To me, this embodies Tim and the kind of campaign he runs.

Tim and his team are building a campaign that will strengthen Virginia's grassroots democratic network and raise up all the other Democratic candidates we'll see in November. After the incredible turnout and energy in Virginia's 2017 elections, we need to carry that momentum all the way to Election Day 2018 if we're going to keep Virginia blue and keep Tim in the Senate.

[But as someone who has run my fair share of campaigns, I know it takes money to run a winning campaign that supports Democrats up and down the ballot. Will you pitch in today to help re-elect Tim to the Senate and keep Virginia blue? >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Z0qbUSuj%2FIm7e8Ly8OIdOWIUwqBFYcFI)

There's no one I'd rather be fighting alongside in the Senate than my friend of over 30 years, Tim Kaine. Let's make sure he has the resources he needs to win in November and keep up the fight.

Thanks for having Tim's back,

_Mark Warner_

P.S. Will you help me surprise Tim by raising 300 of the donations he needs to hit his milestone from this email? [Click here to donate whatever amount you feel comfortable with >>](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=9XkH4QN4IawqNBg0vjCrT%2BSMs7qXZu4T)

Peter -- We could hit a giant milestone this month: **_15,000 individual online donors._**

What would that mean?
1. That our campaign has _the most_ \-- and the most committed -- grassroots supporters in Indiana.
2. **That we CAN take Indiana 's Senate election from a "toss-up" to a WIN.**
3. That Hoosiers WANT Joe representing them in the Senate -- not someone who's beholden to special interest donors and Mitch McConnell.

**Our end-of-quarter deadline is coming up on Saturday -- and getting to 15,000 donors will show that no one can match Joe 's grassroots support. So to get there, we're announcing a time-limited MATCH on all donations.**
**Peter, will you be one of the 162 donors we still need?**

name: Team Sherrod
subject: ATTN: Trump returns to Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | President Donald Trump is paying the Buckeye state a visit AGAIN this Thursday. President Trump and Vice President Mike Pence already made separate trips to Ohio a few weeks ago. **When they were here, they threw their support behind Sherrod's opponent, Congressman Jim Renacci, who's been a strong ally for this White House.** It's clear President Trump has his sights set on the Ohio Senate race. Trump's standing is on the rise in Ohio -- and Renacci is hoping it will be enough to boost himself in the polls. It's up to us to work as hard as possible to keep Sherrod in the Senate, fighting every day on behalf of Ohio families. Hello,

Our win in the 2016 election was one for the history books. It was the closest gubernatorial election in North Carolina history. It was also the first time in our state's history an incumbent governor lost re-election.

It was a huge win -- and it wouldn't have been possible without you. We wouldn't have had a chance without our grassroots supporters.

But we aren't done yet.

**That's why I'm asking you for your help now. We still have to raise $15,000 before the end of this month. Will you chip in $5 -- or whatever you can -- before our deadline?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12037dc/2fde7c66/47c4cafc/1569df0a/3128365280/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-mar18eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180328_mareoq2_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em18_180328_mareoq2_fnd_gq_ful__rc&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---

---
We've accomplished a lot during my first year.

We announced thousands of jobs -- the most announced in any one year for the last decade.

We pushed for a new raise for teachers and laid out the vision for making North Carolina a top 10 best educated state by 2025. We repealed HB2 and signed a non-discrimination order, working to remove that stain from North Carolina's reputation.

But there is more to do. And every week that passes, I'm reminded that our state needs a legislature that is more willing to work with me for the benefit of North Carolina families -- not their own ideology.

[**Chip in today before the deadline to help us Break the Majority.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/12037dc/2fde7c66/47c4cafc/1569df0b/3128365280/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-mar18eoq?utm_campaign=em18_180328_mareoq2_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em18_180328_mareoq2_fnd_gq_ful__rc")
Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina,

Roy

| | Peter -- The first thing I do every morning before getting out of bed is grab my phone and scroll through the news online. Today I had a rude wake-up call when I opened the latest Senate race rankings. **According to _Politico_ , Joe's now ranked as the most vulnerable Democrat in the Senate. **

This news means one thing -- this race couldn't be _ANY_ closer. But that doesn't mean it's time to panic, just that we need to work even harder. Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is only three short days away and your strong support will remind those pundits trapped in the Washington bubble that **Hoosiers still want a senator like Joe who puts them -- not the D.C. special interests -- first.**

**Can I count on you to rush a contribution by our deadline to prove that no matter what the rankings say, Joe 's seat still belongs to Hoosiers?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Something changed this weekend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
Friends,
Here in Maryland, we have felt the urgent need to get dangerous weapons out of the hands of those who would do harm to themselves and others. But with so many politicians bowing to the will of the National Rifle Association, we've felt like the power to act was out of our reach.
Something changed this weekend. As I looked out at the crowd who gathered for the March for Our Lives in Baltimore, **I knew that the NRA 's days of influence on our state are numbered**.
Maryland needs leadership that does not govern under the thumb of the NRA. Yet Governor Hogan received an "A-" rating from the organization after completing their candidate questionnaire in 2014 but refuses to tell us what he promised them in return.
**[We cannot allow a NRA endorsed candidate continue to govern our state. If you agree that we need leaders who will put the safety of their constituents first, donate $5 to our campaign today.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a78b/7ab0e2c4/7f5679a8/349a770f/1772431329/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiT0hRMDMyODhEIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st3-18?refcode=OHQ03288D")**

Did he promise them he would remove Maryland State Police background checks? Did he promise he'd work to repeal current prohibitions on firearms? We don't know. But we need to.
We do know that Governor Hogan refused to join States for Gun Safety, a bipartisan, multi-state coalition to combat gun violence created in the wake of the Parkland shooting. And we know that in 2016, he opposed legislation to ban guns on college campuses.
The NRA endorsed Larry Hogan as the governor who exemplifies their values --but in the wake of Great Mills, Parkland, and countless other tragedies, we cannot allow someone without the courage to stand up to the NRA to lead us into 2019.
